sources.title: AI in Radiology Market Size, Share & Forecast 2026–2031
sources.claim: Market reached $2.16B in 2026, forecast $8.23B by 2031 at 30.7% CAGR

sources.title: Numbers from the FDA: Radiology Maintaining Its Lead in AI Clearances
sources.claim: 1,524 total FDA AI device clearances as of March 30, 2026; 1,163 (76.31%) for radiology

sources.title: Aidoc Banks $150M Series E Backed by Goldman Sachs to Scale Clinical AI Foundation Model
sources.claim: Aidoc $150M Series E closed April 2026; led by Goldman Sachs with NVIDIA NVentures; total funding exceeds $500M; 2,000 hospitals, 60M cases/year

sources.title: Aidoc Secures FDA Clearance for Healthcare's First Foundation Model-Powered Clinical AI Device
sources.claim: January 2026 FDA clearance for single body CT covering 14 conditions, 97% mean sensitivity, 98% mean specificity

sources.title: Viz.ai Closes 2025 with Record Scale and Patient Impact, Achieving Profitability in Its Healthcare Business
sources.claim: Viz.ai reached profitability in healthcare business January 2026; deployed at ~2,000 hospitals; 13 life sciences partnerships (up from 7 in 2024)

sources.title: Radiology in 2026: The Workforce Crisis Meets the AI Revolution
sources.claim: Projected shortfall of 17,000–42,000 radiologists, pathologists, and psychiatrists in the US by 2033

sources.title: AI Medical Imaging in 2026: Best Radiology AI Tools, FDA Clearances, and Diagnostic Accuracy
sources.claim: Overview of top FDA-cleared radiology AI tools and clinical accuracy benchmarks in 2026

sources.title: AI in Medical Imaging Market — Global Opportunity Analysis and Industry Forecast 2026–2036
sources.claim: Global AI in Medical Imaging market size and forecast 2026–2036

sources.title: Qure.ai Gets $65M Series D Funding to Expand Healthcare AI
sources.claim: Qure.ai $65M Series D, $123M total funding, deployed in 30+ countries for TB and pneumonia AI screening

sources.title: Top Imaging & Pathology AI Companies: 2025 Market Analysis
sources.claim: Competitive landscape: Aidoc, Viz.ai, PathAI, GE HealthCare, Siemens Healthineers positioning and market structure

sources.title: Radiology Workflow Optimization 2026: Solving Staff Shortages with AI & Agentic Systems
sources.claim: AI can automate up to 75% of CT lung cancer screening workflow steps; EU AI Act high-risk classification for radiology AI

sources.title: Ethical AI in Radiology 2026: Navigating the EU AI Act, Bias & Governance
sources.claim: EU AI Act high-risk compliance requirements for radiology AI: bias checks, training data documentation, human oversight mandates

unverified_claims.claim: PathAI partnership with Quest Diagnostics bringing AI pathology to 3,500+ service centers
unverified_claims.note: Widely reported; verify exact date and service center count via PathAI press release or Quest Diagnostics investor materials
Derived from positioning as Tier I leader with integrated scanner AI; individual market share not separately disclosed; treat as directional

unverified_claims.claim: AI lung nodule detection reduces read time by 26% and improves detection of missed nodules by 29%
unverified_claims.note: Figures circulate in vendor literature and secondary sources; verify against original peer-reviewed clinical trial
